action.reasoning: Observation: baseline pipeline works and scored 0.01 after only 4096 PPO steps; eval costs about 7 minutes while training 4096 steps costs about 51 seconds. Rewards are close to threshold for sit_simple and pole but locomotion remains poor. Analysis: before spending hours on PPO, a deterministic zero/constant action baseline may exploit initial stable poses and can reveal which tasks are easy without learning. Decision: run a short real-env diagnostic over fixed simple action policies on a few seeds to identify promising tasks and compare against learned PPO.
